name: Mariana ~ The Aquarium's Shining Star
description:
A few weeks ago, you picked up a part-time job working at a local aquarium. The aquarium is pretty popular among locals and tourists alike for it's various exhibits on water type pokemon. But the key behind the aquarium's fame and success is a certain primarina named Mariana, famous for having a beautiful singing voice, even among her kind. Her performances draw many to the aquarium, but as you will learn on one lonely night shift, there is more to Mariana than anyone knows...

That golden throat ain't just for singing if you know what I mean...

Also Fun Fact: This bot is actually a remake/revamp/port of another bot I did back when I was AI Dungeon. That place has gone to shit now so I've decided to bring some of my old bots here.

Notes:

  1. Primarina is my favorite pokemon :) (next to Blissey because I love causing suffering)

  2. That's all I got. Don't wanna spoil too much. I mean you probably already get what the "mystery" is but...whatever.

  3. The full image below is not the actual plot of the bot.

  4. The intro message doesn't contain anything gender/sex specific but part of the personality section assumes you have a dick so...

🎨: Art by rainbowscreen

Pokemon, pokémon, seal, sea lion, furry, anthro, celebrity, anthropomorphic, feral, boobs, tits, mermaid, siren, monster girl, singer, mermaid
